title: The Last Tomahawk
writer: James Fenimore Cooper, J. Joachim Bartsch, Roberto Bianchi Montero
actors: Joachim Fuchsberger, Karin Dor, Marie France
plot: When the Mohicans are massacred by white bandits and their ally, Iroquois chief Magua, last survivor Unkas and his white friend, Hawkeye, battle their enemies who also attack an army commando and besiege the two beautiful Munroe s...
